'''Eermik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who was among the group who agreed to help [[Risso Nu]] eliminate [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] on [[Ma'ar Shaddam/Legends|Ma'ar Shaddam]]. Unfortunately, Fett got the drop on Eermik and managed to drive a [[Knife/Legends|knife]] through the fuel canister on the Bith's back as he accidentally fired upon a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. The droid fired back, blowing up his leaking canister, along with most of the bounty hunters in the room.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|18|Number Two in the Galaxy}} {{1st}}
